scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.dev:worker: cd backend && uv run celery -A app.core.celery_app worker -l info -c 2
scripts.dev:beat: cd backend && uv run celery -A app.core.celery_app beat -l info
scripts.update:latest: echo 'Review breaking changes before merging. Then run: pnpm -r up -L'; exit 1
scripts.lint:be: cd backend && uv run ruff check .
scripts.format:be: cd backend && uv run ruff format .
scripts.format:be:check: cd backend && uv run ruff format --check .
scripts.check: pnpm lint:all && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:be && pnpm format:be:check
